hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && rm -rf site-packages/gapp site-packages/gapp-*.dist-info installed_version && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/requirements.txt" . && python3 -m pip install -t "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/site-packages" -r requirements.txt) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt"
